data.description: overlapping pieces of metal, much like the scales of a fish, suit the wearer's chest worn unprotected. Although this armor is made of metal, it leaves the legs and arms relatively unprotected, providing protection for the wearer's vital organs while leaving the wearer relatively unencumbered.
This armor is inferior to chain mail but doesn't negate blows to chain into it. Rings are usually sewn into it.

Cost: 5 gp
AC: 11 + Dexterity modifier
Stealth Disadvantage
